mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_code ( group_code, code, code_name, parent_code, sort_seq, use_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{group_code}, #{code}, #{code_name}, #{parent_code}, #{sort_seq}, #{use_yn}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM common_code WHERE code_id = #{code_id} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM common_code WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY group_code ASC, sort_seq ASC, code_id ASC
SELECT * FROM common_code WHERE group_code = #{group_code} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY sort_seq ASC, code_id ASC

SELECT cc.code, cc.code_name, COUNT(d.drink_id) AS drinkCount FROM common_code cc LEFT JOIN drink d ON cc.code = d.category_code AND d.is_deleted = 'N' WHERE cc.is_deleted = 'N' AND group_code = 'DRINK_CATEGORY' GROUP BY cc.code, cc.code_name, cc.sort_seq ORDER BY sort_seq ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE common_code SET group_code = #{group_code}, code = #{code}, code_name = #{code_name}, parent_code = #{parent_code}, sort_seq = #{sort_seq}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code_id = #{code_id}
UPDATE common_code SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE code_id = #{code_id}
